upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 4559844 on 2026-03-18] [VERIFY_NAMES: confirm Moyer named as Graham trainee] Olch PD. 'Evarts A. Graham, the American College of Surgeons, and the American Board of Surgery.' J Hist Med Allied Sci. 1972 Jul;27(3):247-61. Graham trained 20 surgical department chairs; Moyer is likely named in this enumeration. Secondary: PMC1356224 review states Graham trained '20 surgical department chairs and 26 chiefs of service.'

upgrades.edge_index_hint: George Heuer -> Cornell University Department of Surgery (institutional_founder, 1932-1947)
upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 12984268 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | Surgery 1952 | content_match] Carter BN. 'The fruition of Halsted's concept of surgical training.' Heuer was Halsted's 13th resident. PMC7828946 documents Heuer's recruitment to Cornell in 1932 and establishment of the Halstedian residency there.

upgrades.edge_index_hint: Mont Reid -> University of Cincinnati Department of Surgery (institutional_founder, 1922-1943)

match_fields.target_node: University of Cincinnati Department of Surgery

upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 12984268 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | Surgery 1952 | content_match] Carter BN. 'The fruition of Halsted's concept of surgical training.' Carter was himself a Cincinnati trainee and documents the Halsted->Heuer->Reid lineage at Cincinnati. PMC7828946 confirms Reid accompanied Heuer to Cincinnati in 1922.

verification_notes: Edge 1 (Graham -> Moyer) requires full-text verification that Moyer is named among Graham's trainees in the Olch PMID 4559844 article. The PMC1356224 review confirms Graham trained 20 department chairs and 26 chiefs of service but does not enumerate all names in the available abstract.
